howItWorks.intro: This rv loan calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: P = loan amount, r = monthly rate, n = total months
Total Interest = (Monthly Payment × Months) – Loan Amount
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is a typical RV loan interest rate?
faq.answer: RV loan rates typically range from 5% to 12% depending on credit score, loan amount, and whether the RV is new or used. Excellent credit borrowers may qualify for rates under 5%.

faq.question: How long can you finance an RV?
faq.answer: RV loans can extend up to 20 years for loans over $50,000. Most common terms are 10-15 years. Shorter terms mean higher payments but significantly less total interest paid.

faq.question: How much should I put down on an RV?
faq.answer: Most lenders require 10-20% down. A larger down payment reduces your monthly payment and total interest, and may qualify you for a better rate.
